text: R53 CNAME vs ALIAS (the problem) @ mpsineamania - @) ararcnc ¢ “A"” maps a NAME to an IP Address e .. catagram.io => 1.3.3.7 e CNAME maps a NAME to another NAME e ... Www.catagram.io => catagram.io * CNAME is invalid for naked/apex (catagram.io) * Many AWS services use a DNS Name (ELBs) ¢ With just CNAME - catagram.io => ELB would be invalid
